validations.title: Flash Loan Price Oracle Manipulation
validations.reasoning: Oracle can be manipulated via flash loan, no TWAP protection
validations.codeEvidence: PriceOracle.getPrice() uses spot price without time-weighting

validations.title: Unchecked External Call Return Value
validations.reasoning: Return value not checked but impact depends on external contract behavior
validations.codeEvidence: Bridge.transfer() ignores bool return from token.transfer()

validations.title: Admin Function Centralization Risk
validations.reasoning: Admin can drain funds but this is by design — governance controlled
